birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The thick-billed cuckoo is found in humid to subhumid woodlands and gallery forests from Guinea in the northwest to Mozambique in the southeast, though it is absent from large areas of the Congo Basin.Johnsgard, Paul A.; The Avian Brood Parasites: Deception at the Nest; pp
